response.justification: Bogdan Szabo's background is heavily focused on web, mobile, and embedded systems development with no direct experience in SoC modeling, AI accelerator hardware optimization, or deep-learning workload analysis. His expertise in software engineering and general system optimization does not align closely with the hardware-software co-design and AI accelerator performance requirements of the Principal Performance Architect role.
strengths: Extensive full-stack software development experience across multiple languages and frameworks
Strong background in performance optimization and system architecture design
Demonstrated ability to contribute to open-source projects and innovative solutions
concerns: No explicit experience with SoC/IP modeling or AI accelerator hardware
Lacks direct exposure to deep neural network training/inference optimization or GPU architecture
Educational background does not match the required qualifications (Bachelor's in CS with no advanced degree)
